name: Peninsula Lamb Shanks
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the lamb shanks with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a Dutch oven. Add shanks and brown on all sides. Remove shanks and set aside.
3. Stir flour into the oil and brown lightly in the Dutch oven.
4. Blend in the broth and 14 cups water gradually, bringing to boiling point.
5. Return shanks to the pot and add onion and garlic. Reduce heat and cover.
6. Simmer for 2 hours and 15 minutes to 2 hours and 30 minutes, or until lamb is tender.
7. Remove lamb to a warm serving platter.
8. Add celery to the liquid in the Dutch oven and cook for 10 minutes.
9. Add tomatoes and parsley and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Spoon sauce over shanks.
